Also this from my google form:

Dw, he's back lmfao 😭😭

I was on a historical bot run and noticed sooo many bots where we (the {{user}}) washed some hot emperor so now we're gonna have the hot emperor/king wash us 🫣

moving on,

It should be back up though! [Click here]
